context: Agent must handle multiple simultaneous changes correctly: update documented function, skip undocumented internal helper, and flag removed documented symbol. Baseline models often conflate changes or over-act on out-of-scope symbols.

checklist.name: Documented function updated
checklist.description: The process_order docstring is updated to document the new dry_run parameter

checklist.name: Removed symbol flagged for review
checklist.description: The report flags deprecated_export as removed with [NEEDS HUMAN REVIEW] and preserves its documentation

checklist.name: Undocumented internal symbol skipped
checklist.description: The report does NOT attempt to document _internal_flush — it is skipped or ignored because it lacks prior documentation
